_comment: Phone Make/Model match list — spec/52 §9. The maintained list of phone makers and model patterns. Make matching is case-insensitive. If model_patterns is ['*'] then ANY model under that make qualifies; otherwise the model must contain (case-insensitive) at least one of the listed substrings. Add new entries as new phones appear; never edit silently — bump schema_version on incompatible changes.

phone_makers._note: Apple also makes iPad; both count as phones for the autofill rule (carry GPS + corrected EXIF TZ).
SM- is the Galaxy model-number prefix Samsung writes when the marketing name isn't in EXIF.
Huawei makes laptops and watches, but only phones write EXIF photos at any volume.
Sony makes both cameras (Alpha line, RX line) and phones (Xperia). Strict model match required — bare Sony Make alone is NOT enough.
LG made phones (LG-* / LM-* model-number prefix) but also fridges, TVs, etc. Strict model match required.
